assertions.title: Board generation handles edge-case seed values

steps.observed: Error: 'Invalid input: expected string, received number' — Zod validation rejects numeric seed value
Error: 'Invalid input: expected string, received number' — same Zod type mismatch
Valid 25-square board rendered successfully with all items populated
Valid 25-square board rendered successfully (seed is a space character)
Valid 25-square board rendered successfully with long seed

evidence.consoleErrors: seed=0 and seed=1 produce Zod validation error: 'Invalid input: expected string, received number'. The seed query param is parsed as a number by TanStack Router/Zod when the value is purely numeric (0, 1). Other seeds render without error.

assertions.issues: seed=0 and seed=1 fail because the Zod schema for seed validates as string, but TanStack Router's query param parsing coerces purely numeric values to numbers. Seeds '00000', 'a', space, and long strings work fine because they are parsed as strings.

assertions.title: No seed parameter shows graceful behavior

steps.expected: Redirects to seeded URL or shows landing page or default board, no crash
steps.observed: Redirects to /game?seed=r2j977obmY (random seed) but then shows React error: 'Rendered more hooks than during the previous render'

evidence.consoleErrors: React error: 'Rendered more hooks than during the previous render' — the redirect from /game to /game?seed=XXXXX triggers a hooks mismatch

assertions.issues: The redirect to a seeded URL does occur, but the React component re-renders with a different hooks count after the redirect, causing a crash. The user sees 'Something went wrong!' error overlay instead of a usable board.

assertions.title: Empty seed parameter shows graceful behavior

steps.expected: Valid board renders or redirect gracefully
steps.observed: Redirects to /game?seed=g4ai6qowNz (random seed) but then shows React error: 'Rendered more hooks than during the previous render'

evidence.consoleErrors: Same React hooks error as VAL-BG-008: 'Rendered more hooks than during the previous render'

assertions.issues: Same root cause as VAL-BG-008 — empty seed triggers redirect to random seed, but React hooks mismatch causes crash.

assertions.title: Special characters in seed do not crash

steps.expected: Valid board, no XSS, no alert dialog
steps.observed: Valid 25-square board rendered. Seed displays as '<script>alert(1)</script>' in text — not executed. No alert dialog appeared.
Valid 25-square board rendered with seed 'hello world'
Identical board to hello%20world — same 25 items in same positions

steps.expected: Different board from abc%2Bdef (different seed string)
steps.observed: Different board from abc%2Bdef, as expected — '+' decodes to space in query params, yielding seed 'abc def'

assertions.title: Unicode seed values produce valid boards

steps.observed: Valid 25-square board rendered. Seed displays as '🎮'. No errors.
Valid 25-square board rendered. Seed displays as 'café'. No errors.

frictions.description: networkidle wait times out on the dev server due to Vite HMR WebSocket. Used sleep 2000 after navigation instead of --load networkidle as documented in user-testing.md.
frictions.resolution: Used sleep 2000 (2-second wait) after each navigation, which was sufficient for all pages to fully render.

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 3 passed (VAL-BG-010, VAL-BG-011, VAL-BG-012), 3 failed. VAL-BG-007 fails because numeric seeds (0, 1) are coerced to numbers by TanStack Router but the Zod schema expects strings — seeds 'a', '00000', space, and long string all work. VAL-BG-008 and VAL-BG-009 fail because the redirect to a random seed triggers a React hooks mismatch error ('Rendered more hooks than during the previous render').
